sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34165" key="e)/mmhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμμηρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνόμηρος</foreign>, <sense id="n34165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">as a hostage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0439.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Demetr.Com.Vet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
